name: paypaga-api-tests
description: Tests para endpoint oauth2 de paypaga

scripts.test:ec: npm run clean && jest "_EC" && npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && node apply-dark-mode.js && npx allure open allure-report
scripts.test:ec:dopayment: npm run clean && jest tests/EC/DoPayment && npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && node apply-dark-mode.js && npx allure open allure-report
scripts.test:ec:payurl:ui: npm run clean && jest tests/EC/DoPayment/Payin/PayURL/v1_payurl_ui_val_EC.test.js && npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && node apply-dark-mode.js && npx allure open allure-report
scripts.test:ar:tc02_05: npm run clean && jest tests/AR/Dinaria/Payin/PayURL/payurl_api_val_dinaria_AR.test.js -t "TC02|TC05" && npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && node apply-dark-mode.js && npx allure open allure-report
